subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath been illumined by the lights of the horizon of Revelation and hath been honored with the glances of thy Lord, the All-Forgiving, the All-Bountiful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد استضاء کتابک من انوار افق الوحی و تشرف بلحاظ عنایه ربک الغفور الکریم و
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @thankfulness; gratitude, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
